Class Country

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane
com.risk.mapeditor.Country
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class Country extends javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane
this is Country class for MapEditor

    • Country

      the ctor for Country class
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the country
      y - The y position of the country

    • Country

      public Country(String name, double x, double y, String continent)
      the ctor for Country class
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the country
      x - The x position of the country
      y - The y position of the country
      continent - The name of the continent it belongs to

    • getAdjList

      public ArrayList<Country> getAdjList()
      getter for the counties adjacent list which contains graph information
      Returns:
      adjList the countries adjacent list

    • addAdjCountry

      public void addAdjCountry(Country country)
      add a countru to the adjacent list of the current country
      Parameters:
      country - The new neighbour country

    • removeAdjCountry

      public void removeAdjCountry(Country country)
      remove a countru from the adjacent list of the current country
      Parameters:
      country - The neighbour country to be removed

    • addEdge

      public void addEdge(Edge e)
      add an edge to the edge list
      Parameters:
      e - the edge to be added

    • removeEdge

      public void removeEdge(Edge e)
      remove an dege from the edge list
      Parameters:
      e - the edge to be removed

    • getEdgeList

      public ArrayList<Edge> getEdgeList()
      getter for the edge list
      Returns:
      current edge list

    • isAdjacent

      public boolean isAdjacent(Country country)
      to decide whether a given country is a neighbour of current country
      Parameters:
      country - The given country
      Returns:
      true if the given country is a neighbour of current country; otherwise return false

    • relocateToPoint

      public void relocateToPoint(boolean isUserClick)
      Relocate the coordinates from scene to local, and align the center to the cursor position
      Parameters:
      isUserClick - If this operation is to deal with a country adding by user click
